scripts.e2e:android: adb reverse tcp:4000 tcp:4000 && concurrently -k -s first "node test/mock-server.mjs" "node test/run-maestro-flows.mjs"
scripts.e2e:electron: npm run e2e:electron:prepare && playwright test -c test/electron/playwright.config.mjs
scripts.e2e:electron:prepare: npm run build && cap sync @capawesome/capacitor-electron && tsc -p electron/tsconfig.json && node test/electron/support/build-fixtures.mjs
